title: Use buildah/pkg/parse volume parsing rather then internal version
body:
We share this code with buildah, so we should eliminate the podman
version.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@QiWang19 PTAL
@baude @mheon @giuseppe @vrothberg @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
looks like some lint issues @rhatdan
@rhatdan  can also vendor `parse.GetBindMount`, `parse.GetTmpfsMount`.
@QiWang19 I don't see those?
of, yes, they are not here. only can be vendored after my PR merged.
Fine, but these are not used in libpod yet, is this something we will need in libpod?
@rhatdan  and changes added to `func ValidateVolumeOpts`  in this pr https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/3369 is not in buildah now, this vendor will wipe that out
Correct, could you convert the buildah version to do this and then we can fix up my PR.
@QiWang19 BTW Good Catch.

Hold this. I made changes to option parsing during my big refactor of the
volume code, and I don't know if these are in the Buildah code.

Looking further, I'm confident that the Buildah code is not usable as is.
It's missing at least one bugfix I made.

Yup, @QiWang19 will add the changes to buildah code and then we can revendor that here.

I created this PR in buildah https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1698 to vendor ValidateVolumeOpts
but I think it makes sense to hold this for mheon's big refactor.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3598) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@baude @mheon @vrothberg @giuseppe @TomSweeneyRedHat @ashley-cui @QiWang19 PTAL
This finally passes tests, removing code from Podman to share it with buildah.
LGTM
LGTM
LGTM and happy green tests
/lgtm
